channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in TypeScript (Monthly)

item.title: 🟦 tigicion/dao-code (1435 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tigicion

📝 Repository: tigicion/dao-code

📄 Descrizione: Open-source TypeScript terminal coding agent for DeepSeek-V4 — builds on DeepSeek's strong price-performance and ultra-cheap cache pricing, engineering byte-stable prefixes and cache-reusing forks so cross-session memory and a continuous self-correction layer add almost no token cost; 1M context, Skills/MCP/Hooks, Claude Code config compatible.

⭐ Stelle: 1435

🍴 Forks: 32

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent cli coding-agent deepseek llm terminal typescript

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-08T08:10:42Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-04T05:12:43Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📝 Repository: shy3130/tickflow-stock-panel

📄 Descrizione: 自托管、零运维的 A 股「选股 + 监控 + 回测」量化工作台 | 基于 TickFlow 数据源 | LLM能力驱使策略定制+个股分析+复盘 | 自由接入第三方个性化扩展数据 | 个人开源 ,不属于tickflow官方项目

item.description:
👤 Owner: UditAkhourii

📝 Repository: UditAkhourii/adhd

📄 Descrizione: ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Claude & Codex Agent SDK. Fans out parallel divergent thoughts under different cognitive frames, scores, prunes traps, deepens the survivors. The no-brainer skill for creative and interdisciplinary work.

item.title: 🟦 zenhosta/9drive (596 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zenhosta

📝 Repository: zenhosta/9drive

📄 Descrizione: 9Drive is a storage gateway web app for connecting multiple Google Drive accounts into one virtual storage dashboard. Users can connect Google Drive accounts, track quota, upload files, organize files with virtual folders, preview files, and let the backend route uploads to the Drive account with enough free space.
